title: phyllagathis peltata
intro: Phyllagathis peltata, also known as the silver leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllagathis peltata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs. The herbal preparations of Phyllagathis peltata include infusions, decoctions, and powder, which are often used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems.
